title: Climate Deep III: Full Earth System Coupling & Long-Term Dynamics

carbon_cycle_feedbacks.key_insight: Carbon cycle feedbacks = EML-1/2; abrupt permafrost thaw = EML-∞

known_tipping_cascades: Arctic ice → AMOC → Amazon (via jet stream) — EML-∞ chain
AMOC collapse → monsoon shift → Sahel greening — EML-∞
Permafrost → CO2 → further warming → more permafrost — EML-∞ loop
tipping_domino.key_insight: Individual tipping = EML-∞; domino cascades = EML-∞ composed — still EML-∞

long_term_evolution.key_insight: Weathering thermostat = EML-1 stabilizer; snowball bifurcation = EML-∞

eml_depth_summary.EML-0: Stoichiometric ratios, topological network of tipping connections
eml_depth_summary.EML-1: Carbon cycle feedbacks (Q10), weathering thermostat, permafrost
eml_depth_summary.EML-2: Radiative forcing ln(C/C₀), cross-tipping interaction products
eml_depth_summary.EML-\u221e: All individual tipping, all cascades, snowball Earth, hothouse Earth

key_theorem: The EML Earth System Theorem: Earth system feedbacks are EML-1 (exponential responses). Forcing functions are EML-2 (logarithmic CO₂, rational solar). All tipping transitions are EML-∞. Critically: cascading tipping (domino effects) are ALSO EML-∞ — composition of EML-∞ events does not increase the depth, but does increase the probability and decrease the threshold.
rabbit_hole_log: CO₂ feedback C(T) = C_pre*exp(β*ΔT) = EML-1 (same as BCS gap structure!)
Weathering thermostat = EML-1 negative feedback: stabilizes Gaia for 4 Gyr
Cascade probability = 1-exp(-λn²) = EML-1 with quadratic exponent
Cross-tipping product = exp(-0.1T_a)*exp(-0.05T_am) = EML-1 composed = EML-1
Hothouse sigmoid → EML-∞ in sharp limit (same as all transition phenomena)

connections.S137_climate_v2: Extends S137 with full carbon cycle + domino tipping + Gyr dynamics
connections.S132_evolution_v2: Major evolutionary transitions ↔ tipping points: both EML-∞
connections.S57_stat_mech: Carbon cycle feedback = EML-1 (same as Boltzmann partition)
